TextView.value: 1. Use /ManagerRaid to open or close the UI.
2. Select a nearby player from the 'Player' dropdown.
3. Click 'Add' to save them to your invite list.
4. Click 'Invite' to invite all saved players to your team or raid.
5. Use 'Remove' to delete one, or 'Clear' to reset the list.
6. Must be in a team before inviting.
7. Player list is saved to disk and auto-loaded on startup.
